title: ［置頂］A1都上埋 咁都仲唔幫手炒大佢？今晚21:00要人

replies.msg:
［國際戰線一齊打］​
​

天時，地利我地都齊，依家只係爭東風再起。​
美國 #antifa 嘅示威開始減弱，全世界嘅焦點都係 #policebrutality 。​

​
我地香港思流正正就係有兩位成員在12/6的和平街站中被捕，當中更有傳媒拍下警察以壓頸的方式，粗暴制服我們的成員。​
​

正值全世界反警察暴力，焦點亦可以翻返嚟香港。
​
​
我地思流呼籲各位：​
今晚（14/6）21:00 準時在自己的social media post出右圖，再次向國際響起呼救的訊號。​
​
Format可以如下：​
There are students from #ideologisthk were attacked by the police by being suppressed on her neck and restrained on the ground, at totally peaceful atmosphere, to emphasize.​
​
We sincerely hope that people - no matter you're living in Hong Kong, or places across the continents - to pay attention to Hong Kong Police brutality towards us, the secondary students and Hong Kong citizens.​
​
Respond to the appeal by @ideologisthk​
#policebrutality​
#hkpolicebruality​
#studentslivesmatter​
#hkerlivesmatter ​
​
希望今晚九點，可以準時見到大家。​
​
#香港思流 #policebrutality

同意要推俾國際知
但唔同意 同單一format
外國好反感
如果真係冇bite 講真蘋果都唔會放A1
Tui young live matter

​
我地思流呼籲各位：​
今晚（14/6）21:00 準時在自己的social media post出右圖，再次向國際響起呼救的訊號。​
​
Format可以如下：​
There are students from #ideologisthk were attacked by the police by being suppressed on her neck and restrained on the ground, at totally peaceful atmosphere, to emphasize.​
​
We sincerely hope that people - no matter you're living in Hong Kong, or places across the continents - to pay attention to Hong Kong Police brutality towards us, the secondary students and Hong Kong citizens.​
​
Respond to the appeal by @ideologisthk​
#policebrutality​
#hkpolicebruality​
#studentslivesmatter​
#hkerlivesmatter ​
​
希望今晚九點，可以準時見到大家。​
​
#香港思流 #policebrutality

replies.msg:
其實好似10點鳩叫咁 每晚2130-2200都全部人上twitter 目標global trend 一兩個hashtag有無得唸？

如果支持(真係會幫手做既）可唔可以👍🏼
多人肯做會嘗試策劃個daily twitter trend campaign

每日推一個hashtag
唔一定係好香港specify好似 #HongKongProtests #FightForFreedom #StandwithHongKong
有時可以做generic啲同全世界connect例如 #PoliceBrutality #WomensRight #ChildAbuse
甚至乎主打CCP好似 #CCP_is_terrorist #CCPVirus #BoycottMadeInChina

如果一個hashtag上worldwide trend係會多好人留意
夜晚時間歐美亞洲都起晒身 audience reach會最多

初步構思
1.每日lunch hour公布一個hashtag
2. 大家各自係選擇相應既 相片/影片/文宣
3. 配上外語(如果中文 - 用書面語)caption
4. 加daily hashtag (可以追加其他#)
5. 盡量like晒其他手足既post務求將香港人既post推高 reach多啲外人

歡迎大家一齊brainstorm
我係外地已推上Twitter.  請大家努力推爆佢。
